label: Position Summary
description: Six KPIs: position count, total notional, unrealised P&L, margin used, long exposure, and short exposure.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget — wrapper.tsx line 89

0.4.note: no any or @ts — ignore in widget file

0.5.note: widget imports only from context, shared, and lib/reference — data

0.6.note: added isLoading to usePositionsData() destructure; all metric values render " — " when loading

0.7.note: KPI strip shows zeros when positions array is empty (valid state for a summary strip)

0.8.note: added positionsError guard: renders rose error message when context reports an error

0.9.note: no commented — out blocks or unreachable branches

l0.notes: Fixed 0.6 and 0.8: widget was destructuring only summary from context, ignoring isLoading and positionsError. Both now wired. useMemo kept before the conditional return to satisfy Rules of Hooks.

1.1.note: reads summary, isLoading, positionsError exclusively via usePositionsData()

1.2.note: positions — data — context.tsx uses useGlobalScope() and scopeStrategyIds

1.3.note: positions filtered by scopeStrategyIds derived from globalScope.organizationIds (context line 584 — 587)

1.4.note: getStrategyIdsForScope accepts clientIds; org→client→strategy cascade in context

1.7.note: widget has no inline reference data; formatCurrency imported from lib/reference — data (correct location)

l1.notes: Context (read-only): DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS is inline in the context (positions-data-context.tsx lines 113-219). This is a context-layer concern, not a widget concern. Flagged for future context cleanup.

knownIssues.description: DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS (5 hardcoded positions) is defined inline in positions-data-context.tsx. Should be moved to lib/mocks/fixtures/ once context is refactored.

findings.description: Widget was not reading isLoading from usePositionsData(). All 6 metric values now show "—" while loading.
Widget was not reading positionsError from usePositionsData(). Added error guard returning a rose error message before KpiSummaryWidget render.
